hero.tagline: We play loud. We play live.

about.title: About us
about.p1: SWAYDAY is the band that delivers high energy live experiences for every occasion. The members have been playing together since 2012 and have performed on stages across the US and the Nordic countries.
about.p2: SWAYDAY brings a dance friendly pop sound to their original songs, along with a wide repertoire of covers ranging from classic soul tracks to modern pop hits. Whether it's a wedding reception, a corporate event or a concert, SWAYDAY creates an atmosphere that makes everyone want to dance and have a great time.
about.p3: Want to book us? We have extensive experience with full service solutions and can help tailor a performance to suit your specific event. Get in touch and we'll tell you more!

book.hero_subtitle: We play weddings, corporate events, and live concerts. Get in touch and let us make your party unforgettable!
book.contact_subtitle: Interested in booking us? We reply quickly.
